name: codara-skills
description: Bundled skills for Codara including security controls, audit logging, hooks configuration, and workflow automation

skills.name: security-check
skills.description: Block dangerous shell commands (rm -rf, sudo, chmod 777, etc.) via deny rules and PreToolUse hook guard

skills.name: audit-logger
skills.description: Structured audit logging for all tool calls using PostToolUse hooks. Records time, tool, input, and sessionId to .codara/audit.log

skills.name: permissions
skills.description: Configure Codara permissions safely using defaultMode plus allow/deny/ask rules. Manage tool access policies

skills.name: hooks
skills.description: Configure lifecycle hooks (PreToolUse/PostToolUse/SessionStart) and scaffold new hook-based skills. Includes templates and development toolkit

skills.name: skill-dev
skills.description: Design, create, or refactor Codara skills with maintainable structure and consistent schema. Comprehensive toolkit for skill development

skills.name: mcp
skills.description: Guide for integrating Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. Connect external services and tools to Codara

skills.name: commit
skills.description: Intelligent git commit creation with automatic change analysis. Analyzes staged changes and generates meaningful commit messages

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Multi-agent PR code review with parallel analysis. Checks for bugs, security issues, and CLAUDE.md compliance (requires gh CLI)
